---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new playbook section, artifact, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Problem Statement

Describe the problem or gap clearly.
What is missing?
What is unclear?
What is not working?

# Context

Where does this apply?

- Cultural enablement
- Coaching structures
- Metrics
- Transformation
- RACI
- Templates
- Diagrams

Provide links to existing files if relevant.

# Proposed Solution

Describe what should be added or changed.

Examples:
- Add new markdown file under docs/culture
- Expand an existing section
- Add a swimlane diagram under docs/diagrams
- Introduce a new metric definition under docs/metrics

Be specific about folder and file name if possible.

# Expected Outcome

What improvement will this create?

- Improved clarity
- Better alignment
- Stronger governance
- Measurable transformation impact
- Reduced ambiguity

# Risks or Tradeoffs

Are there any risks or complexity introduced?

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] ASCII-only markdown
- [ ] Navigation updated if new file is added
- [ ] No duplication with existing content
- [ ] Templates are implementation-ready
